title: Shared Genetics of Kidney Function Traits and Bladder Cancer: A Genome-Wide Cross-Trait Analysis.
abstract: Clinical and epidemiological evidence has suggested a potential association between kidney dysfunction and bladder cancer (BC). One hypothesis for this comorbidity is the presence of a common genetic etiology. However, little is known about the shared genetics and causality of this association. Thus, we aimed to investigate shared genetic architecture and the causal link between kidney dysfunction and bladder cancer.
